hero.title: Every Classic Tells a Story
hero.subtitle: Build a verified, blockchain-backed record of your vehicle's journey. From restoration to rally, every milestone preserved forever.

preview.title: Your Vehicle's Digital Passport
preview.subtitle: A living record that grows with your vehicle. Every restoration, event, and certification captured and verified.
preview.label: Vehicle Passport

audience.title: Built for the Classic Community
audience.subtitle: Whether you're preserving a family heirloom or documenting a full restoration, ClassicsChain serves every stakeholder.

collectors.title: Collectors & Enthusiasts
collectors.description: Build verified provenance that travels with your vehicle. Every owner, every event, every restoration, documented and immutable.

workshops.title: Workshops & Restorers
workshops.description: Issue certified restoration reports that prove your craftsmanship. Your work becomes part of the vehicle's permanent record.

events.title: Event Organizers
events.description: Create participation certificates for rallies, concours, and meets. Give attendees proof of their vehicle's presence.

heritage.title: Museums & Heritage
heritage.description: Preserve automotive history with verifiable documentation. Connect physical exhibits to their digital provenance.

cta.title: Ready to preserve your vehicle's legacy?
cta.subtitle: Join ClassicsChain and start building a verifiable record that lasts generations.
